title: calea oliveri
intro: Calea oliveri, also known as "Dream Herb," is a plant species native to Mexico, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of anxiety and insomnia, due to its sedative and calming effects. The health benefits of Calea oliveri include reducing stress and promoting relaxation, making it a popular remedy for individuals struggling with sleep disorders and emotional imbalances. Calea oliveri can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or capsule, allowing for various forms of consumption to suit individual preferences and needs.
